name: Sumo Wrestling Battle
description: Ready to SMASH? Get set, SMASH LEGENDS! SMASH LEGENDS is free and fun PvP Action MOBA fight and supports clash & Duo fight online. Smash your opponents in SMASH LEGENDS online, while unlocking and upgrading Legends. This amazing and satisfying Belly Clash game is the run of your life, and it will test your strength, timing, running, and twerking skills so your brain generates the most power! Watch your opponents fly out of the ring when you transform your body into a big fat sumo fight machine and defeat them. And how can you defeat them in this twerking game? Easy! Just run healthy through the runway.
instructions: UP-- UP Arrow OR W DOWN -- DOWN Arrow OR S LEFT --- LEFT Arrow OR A RIGHT --- RIGHT Arrow OR D The up button double-tap will be used to hit the opponent
